variants: Doriane Malherbe excels in the field of natural resource economics, where she addresses pressing environmental issues. Under the mentorship of Arwa Ibrahiem, she completed her doctorate and honed her research skills. Her work has been supported by the Timberline Advancement Trust, enabling her to undertake significant projects in sustainability. Additionally, Doriane holds a Jungle Translator Accreditation, reflecting her commitment to foster dialogue between scientists and indigenous communities. Her articles are published in the Oakroot Folio, which adds to her prominence in discussions surrounding natural resources.
